page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 372.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 3.88 GB per core. For acceleration, it bundles four NVIDIA Turing T4 GPUs, delivering a combined 64 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core processing is relatively weak, as shown by stress-ng single-core and single-threaded gzip compression results. However, multi-core performance is strong, with stress-ng multi-core and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression scoring in the top 25%. Memory performance is also robust, with small-block cached read bandwidth reaching 3924.63 GB/sec, while large-block uncached read and write bandwidths remain average. Additionally, the instance demonstrates high efficiency in database operations, achieving 64.27 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks.

Given its hardware profile, this instance offers a cost-efficient platform for workloads that can leverage parallel GPU processing and high multi-core CPU density without requiring high single-thread performance or local NVMe storage. The combination of four NVIDIA T4 GPUs and 96 dedicated cores makes it suitable for machine learning inference, video transcoding, multi-threaded data processing, and high-throughput Redis caching layers.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 372.0 GB of system memory and four NVIDIA Turing T4 GPUs, providing a total of 64 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage but offers a 30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks indicate weak single-core capabilities but strong multi-core and multi-threaded performance, alongside high cached memory bandwidth and excellent Redis SET throughput. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for parallelized workloads such as machine learning inference, multi-threaded data processing, and high-throughput caching, offering a balanced resource density for GPU-driven and multi-core tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 96 Intel Xeon cores, 372 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs, optimized for multi-threaded processing and machine learning inference.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge features 96 Intel Xeon cores, 372 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs for parallelized and multi-threaded workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated platform featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs for highly parallelized multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: Ninety-six dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores on x86_64 architecture
Four NVIDIA Turing T4 GPUs providing 64 GB of total VRAM
372 GB of system memory and 30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Strong multi-core CPU and multi-threaded decompression performance
High-throughput capability for Redis database operations
Best suited for machine learning inference and parallel data processing
